Video.summary: Tips for making fish and chips.
Video.title: Fish & Chips Night

Video.summary: Desiree makes a cashew butter smoothie, a sage-fried tofu scramble, tempura vegetables and apple butter-pecan-gorgonzola turnovers.
Video.title: Healthy and Delicious

Video.summary: Desiree makes a colorful tonic, a sweet potato hash, a warm romaine lettuce, challah, and lasagna.
Video.title: Lettuce Eat Lasagna

Video.summary: Desiree shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.
Video.title: Veggies Galore

Video.summary: Desiree uses blueberries, celery, cucumber, oranges and red cabbage to make a juice.
Video.title: Treat Yourself

Video.summary: Desiree prepares matcha, a breakfast with spiced lentils with eggs, a mushroom bisque and banana bread.
Video.title: Fun and Simple

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises Jesse Magallanes with his DNA results and helps him explore his newfound heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Jesse Magallanes

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.
Video.title: Butter

Video.summary: Desiree shakes up a classic recipe with kefir, makes a warm breakfast and two grilled cheese recipes.
Video.title: On Trend

Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Laird's DNA test results and explores his heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Laird Hercules

Video.summary: Theresa Visintin makes the world's most decadent recipe by combining both cheese and chocolate.
Video.title: Cheese & Chocolate

Video.summary: Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic by fusing the flavors of maple and Mahi-mahi.
Video.title: Maple Syrup & Mahi Mahi

Video.summary: Chef Leah Wildman challenges herself to combine lamb and lemongrass in one dish.
Video.title: Lamb and Lemongrass

Video.summary: Theresa creates a delightful dish using the unlikely combination of tuna and tangerine.
Video.title: Tuna & Tangerine

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with haddock rice balls with garlic scape pesto and escargot and mushroom puff pastry tarts.
Video.title: Garlic

Video.summary: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.
Video.title: Arepas: Venezuela's National Bread

Video.summary: Chef Luis Valenzuela fries up classic Mexican bean recipes, proving that the side dish can also be the main attraction.
Video.title: Traditional Mexican Beans

Video.summary: Chef Natalia makes shepherd's pie, spätzle, and compote pears two different ways.
Video.title: Argentinian Comfort Food

Video.summary: Chef Derek Dammann demonstrates techniques for elevating the classic potato.
Video.title: Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann

Image.alt: Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann

Video.summary: Chef Derek Dammann shares techniques for cooking with a selection from the Allium family.
Video.title: Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann

Image.alt: Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
Allium Episode with Chef Derek Dammann

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong teaches his tricks for building bowls full of broth and flavor in his celebration of soup.
Video.title: Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong

Image.alt: Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong

Video.summary: Mary Bosco discovers her newfound roots through DNA analysis and celebrates them through cooking.
Video.title: Meet Mary Bosco

Video.summary: Chef Craig Wong combines the tastes of Ireland and Japan to create delicious pub food fare.
Video.title: Ireland + Japan

Video.summary: Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights; chef Michael Bonacini introduces the region's fine cuisine with four of his favorite dishes, drawing attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture.
Video.title: Tuscany

Video.summary: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all; an antipasto of succulent soft shell crab is paired with a tangy aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy.
Video.title: Veneto

Video.summary: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine; the region balances simplicity with intensity through flavorful dishes; an antipasto of folded flatbread with ricotta and fennel seeds inspires with its intricate beauty and a simple recipe.
Video.title: Sicily

Video.summary: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine; exploring its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favorite meals; an antipasto with crispy fried mussels; highlighting Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes.
Video.title: Puglia

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam, Lebanon, China, and Germany.
Video.title: Vietnam, Lebanon, China, Germany

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Thailand, carrot pad thai; France, ground cherry salad; Sweden, Swedish pecan balls; Italy, corn farrotto.
Video.title: Thailand, France, Sweden, Italy

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by France, French fennel soup; Japan, Unagi-style soy glazed figs; Morocco, Moroccan butter bean tagine; Mexico, asparagus ceviche.
Video.title: France, Japan, Morocco, Mexico

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Italy, Morocco, Ethiopia, and Jamaica.
Video.title: Italy, Morocco, Ethiopia, Jamaica

Video.summary: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia's tomato nasi goreng; Greece's Greek melon salad; Syria's kidney bean hummus; Thailand's coconut curry cabbage rolls.
Video.title: Indonesia, Greece, Syria, Thailand

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Bar Food Done Good

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Cook the Books
